title: CSA S16-14 Steel I-Beam Design
description: Design steel i-beams in accordance with CSA S16-14.

standard.description: Standard. Symbol: Standard. Standard used for calculations.

section_input.description: Section. Symbol: Section. Select Custom to edit section dimensions or select a shape from our library.

b_input.description: b. Symbol: b. Units: mm. Section Width.

d_input.description: d. Symbol: d. Units: mm. Section Height.

t_f_input.description: tf. Symbol: t_f. Units: mm. Flange Thickness.

t_w_input.description: tw. Symbol: t_w. Units: mm. Web Thickness.

F_y_input.description: Fy. Symbol: F_y. Units: MPa. Steel Yield Strength.

KL_z_input.description: KLz. Symbol: KL_{z}. Units: mm. Unbraced length about the Z Axis (compression).

KL_y_input.description: KLy. Symbol: KL_{y}. Units: mm. Unbraced length about the Y Axis (compression).

KL_t_input.description: KLt. Symbol: KL_{t}. Units: mm. Unbraced torsional length (compression).

KL_b_input.description: KLb. Symbol: KL_{b}. Units: mm. Unbraced flexural-torsional length (bending).

M_fz_input.description: Mfz. Symbol: M_{fz}. Units: kN*m. Major Axis Factored Moment (About the Z-Axis).

M_fy_input.description: Mfy. Symbol: M_{fy}. Units: kN*m. Minor Axis Factored Moment (About the Y-Axis).

V_fy_input.description: Vfy. Symbol: V_{fy}. Units: kN. Major Axis Factored Shear (Y direction).

V_fz_input.description: Vfz. Symbol: V_{fz}. Units: kN. Minor Axis Factored Shear (Z direction).

P_f_input.description: Pf. Symbol: P_{f}. Units: kN. Factored Axial Load (X direction, Tension negative).

uid.description: Calculator unique identifier — must match the endpoint uid.

current_unit_system.description: Unit system for input values and output display.

project_details.description: Optional project metadata for the PDF report header.
